finding-001.description: IEnvironment service injection pattern - services injected via MST environment, accessed with getEnv<IEnvironment>(self)
finding-001.relevantCode: interface IEnvironment { services: { persistence: IPersistenceService }; context: { schemaName: string; location?: string } }
finding-001.recommendation: Extend IEnvironment.services to include auth?: IAuthService for injecting Supabase auth service

finding-002.description: IPersistenceService interface pattern - async contracts with context-based isolation
finding-002.relevantCode: interface IPersistenceService { saveCollection(ctx, snapshot): Promise<void>; loadCollection(ctx): Promise<any|null> }
finding-002.recommendation: Follow same interface pattern for IAuthService: async methods, context for tenant isolation, null returns instead of throws

finding-003.description: NullPersistence test double pattern - in-memory implementation for fast unit tests
finding-003.relevantCode: class NullPersistence implements IPersistenceService { private cache = new Map<string, any>() }
finding-003.recommendation: Create MockAuthService implementing IAuthService for unit tests without Supabase dependency

finding-004.description: CollectionPersistable mixin pattern for composing behavior into MST models
finding-004.recommendation: Create AuthStateMixin for composing auth-specific actions (login, logout, refresh) into root store

finding-005.description: enhanceRootStore hook in schema transformation for adding cross-cutting concerns
finding-005.recommendation: Use enhanceRootStore to compose AuthStateMixin into generated root stores

finding-006.description: Workspace-based isolation using location string in context
finding-006.recommendation: Auth context can leverage location for multi-tenant workspace isolation

finding-007.description: MCP tool registration pattern with parameter validation via ArkType
finding-007.relevantCode: server.addTool({ name, description, parameters: ArkTypeSchema, execute })
finding-007.recommendation: Follow same pattern if adding auth-aware MCP tools

finding-008.description: Test pattern: state reset before each test, mock environment creation
finding-008.recommendation: Auth tests should follow same isolation pattern with mock auth service reset

finding-009.description: React Context + Hook pattern for app-wide state (WavesmithStoreContext, WavesmithMetaStoreContext)
finding-009.recommendation: Create AuthContext + useAuth() hook following same provider pattern

finding-010.description: Singleton service class pattern for external APIs
finding-010.relevantCode: class MCPService { ... } export const mcpService = new MCPService()

finding-011.description: Vite environment variables with VITE_ prefix
finding-011.recommendation: Supabase credentials already configured - use import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL

finding-012.description: No existing auth components or protected route patterns
finding-012.recommendation: Create Auth components: LoginForm, SignupForm, ProtectedRoute wrapper

finding-013.description: React Router flat routing with no guards
finding-013.recommendation: Add ProtectedRoute component to wrap authenticated routes

finding-014.description: Auth tokens should not be persisted to disk via standard persistence service
finding-014.recommendation: Use NullPersistence or browser-only secure storage for auth state; never persist tokens to filesystem
